title: Drop Jump
goal: Assess functional leg and trunk stability
execution: Stand on both legs on a box or bench about 30 cm high
Hands on hips
Push off on one leg
Land on one leg

blocks.label: Assessment
items: Controlled landing on the whole sole of the foot, avoiding the leg axis caving inward (medial) and the pelvis tilting
Perform with each leg separately to detect a side-to-side difference

title: Single-leg Hop for Distance
goal: Assess functional leg and trunk stability
execution: Stand on one leg
Hands on hips
One-legged push-off for maximum distance
One-legged landing
Measure the jump distance from the take-off mark to the heel

blocks.label: Assessment
items: Controlled, stable landing without a recovery step or windmilling the arms
Perform with each leg separately to detect a side-to-side difference

title: Side Hop Test
goal: Assess functional leg and trunk stability
execution: Stand on one leg
Hands on hips
10 valid one-legged side hops over the markers, or one-legged side hops for a total of 30 seconds
Count the valid hops

blocks.label: Assessment
items: Markers 30 or 40 cm apart
Controlled execution without putting the other leg down
Perform with both legs to detect a side-to-side difference

title: Y-Balance
equipment: Measuring mat or Y-Balance test kit
goal: Assess functional leg and trunk stability
execution: Stand on one leg
Hands on hips
With the free leg, push the movable boards/blocks as far as possible in the test direction
Measure the maximum distance pushed

blocks.label: Assessment
items: Controlled execution without a recovery step or windmilling the arms
Perform with each leg separately to detect a side-to-side difference

title: Knee-lift Run
execution: Straight run over a distance of about 30 m
Lift the free leg to 90° flexion with maximum explosive power

blocks.label: Variant
items: Alternate lifting the legs every 3 steps

title: Lunge
execution: Stand on both legs
Hands on hips
Controlled lunge until the front leg reaches 90° knee flexion
Hold the position for 10 seconds
10 repetitions per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Keep the upper body upright
Do not twist the upper body
Perform with both legs

title: Lunge with Rotation
execution: Stand on both legs
Controlled lunge to 90° knee flexion
From close to the body, move the ball calmly and under control forward to maximum arm's length
Alternately rotate the upper body with the ball 90° to the left and right
10 repetitions per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Keep the upper body vertical and the pelvis level
The weight of the ball can be varied

title: ShinBox with Hip Extension
goal: Mobility and strengthening of the trunk muscles
execution: Start seated with the knees bent at 90°
Feet hip-width apart
Upright trunk posture
Let both knees tip in a controlled, parallel way to one side while the heels stay firmly on the floor
Tip the legs under control to the other side
Caution: heels stay on the floor throughout, upper body stays upright
3–4 × 15 repetitions

blocks.label: Variant
items: At each end position, rise up into a tall-kneeling position

title: Hamstring Stretch Flow
goal: Functional strengthening and motor control of the hip, glute and hamstring muscles
execution: Start from a hip-width stance
Squat down so the hands touch the feet
Straighten the legs
Stand up and cross the arms in front of the chest
Bend one leg into 90° hip and knee flexion
Transition into a single-leg standing-scale balance (free leg straight behind)
Slowly stand back up and change sides
Load: 3–4 × per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Upper body and free leg form a straight line
Keep the standing leg as straight as possible

title: Monster Walk
goal: Functional strengthening of the hip and glute muscles
execution: Place the band around the thighs
Very wide stance with the pelvis tucked and a straight upper body
Take slow, diagonal steps forward and backward

blocks.label: Notes
items: Band at the thighs = easy
Band at the lower legs = medium
Band at the feet = hard

title: Hip Abduction with Power Band
goal: Functional strengthening of the hip and glute muscles
execution: Place the band around the thighs just above the knee
Lie on your side
Hand on the hip for support
Abduct (spread) the leg at the hip joint
Load: 4 × 10 steps on each side

blocks.label: Variant
items: Lateral abduction in a side-plank

title: Catch & Reach
execution: Hip-width stance, then transition into a single-leg stance
Touch the cone with the opposite (contralateral) hand while standing on one leg
Catch and throw a ball back while standing on one leg
Load: 10–15 repetitions per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Partner exercise
The weight of the ball can be varied

title: Bosu Ball Kicks
equipment: Bosu ball or similar, ball, training partner
execution: Hip-width stance on a Bosu ball, arms held forward or crossed in front of the chest
A football is thrown to you at leg height
Play the ball back under control with the inside of the foot
Load: 12–15 repetitions per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Partner exercise

title: Rotation with Throw
execution: Controlled lunge to 90° knee flexion
The ball is thrown to you from the side
Catch the ball with arms outstretched and rotate the upper body 90° in the direction of the throw
Dynamically rotate the upper body back while throwing the ball back
10 repetitions per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Keep the upper body vertical and the pelvis level
The weight of the ball can be varied

title: Lunge with Lateral Pull
execution: Controlled lunge to 90° knee flexion
Hold the band under light tension with the arms stretched straight up
As you move down into the lunge, the partner increases the band tension

blocks.label: Notes
items: Keep the upper body vertical and the pelvis level

blocks.label: Variant
items: Band around the thigh

title: 1-Arm Row
equipment: Resistance band / cable, fixed point or partner
goal: Complex stabilization of the single-leg stance; transfer exercise for running and jumping
execution: Deep lunge position forward (ankle, knee and hip bent to 90°)
Elastic band or cable fixed in front of the body
Band/cable always on the side opposite the front leg
Simultaneous movement: stand up into the single-leg stance while pulling against the band/cable
Load: 3–4 × 12–15 repetitions per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Stand up and pull at the same time, under control
Do not let the standing leg rotate inward
Position the upper body over the standing leg

title: 1-Arm Press with Mini-Band
equipment: Resistance band / cable, fixed point or partner
goal: Complex stabilization of the single-leg stance; transfer exercise for running and jumping
execution: Deep lunge position forward (ankle, knee and hip bent to 90°)
Elastic band or cable fixed behind the body
Simultaneous movement: stand up into the single-leg stance while pressing against the band/cable
Load: 4 × 12 repetitions per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Stand up and press at the same time, under control
Do not let the standing leg rotate inward
Position the upper body over the standing leg

title: Triple Extension
goal: Extension at the hip, knee and ankle
execution: Parallel stance, one arm's length from a stable wall
Standing leg: extend at hip, knee and ankle (rise onto the toes)
Bend and extend the swing leg maximally at hip, knee and ankle
Load: 2–3 minutes per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Increase the range of motion slowly with each repetition
Train the end points of the movement with extra emphasis

blocks.label: Variant
items: Perform on the toes (heels raised)

title: Deadlift
equipment: Exercise band, barbell, optionally a 1.5 m bar
execution: Hip-width stance on a band
Band held taut in both hands or fixed to a bar
Back straight
Controlled extension of the legs and straightening of the upper body against the resistance
Load: 4 × 12 repetitions per side

blocks.label: Notes
items: Always keep the elastic resistance band under tension

title: Squat on Wobble Board
execution: Hip-width stance on a wobble board
Hands crossed in front of the chest
Bend at the ankle, knee and hip
Keep the leg axis straight (no knock-knee)
Controlled transition from squat to standing
Load: 4 × 12 repetitions

blocks.label: Variant
items: Advanced late phase: perform the exercise on an exercise ball

title: Nordic Hamstrings
execution: Hip-width tall-kneel, arms crossed in front of the chest
A partner holds the ankles firmly
Version 1: lean forward and back up under control
Version 2: lean forward slowly and catch yourself with the hands
Load: 4 × 12 repetitions

blocks.label: Notes
items: Partner exercise

title: Jump Linear / Lateral
goal: Prepare for single-leg jumps forward and to the side
execution: Land and take off at the same time
Land on the whole sole of the foot
Jump forward or to the side
Optimal flexion at the knee and hip joints

blocks.label: Notes
items: Safe, non-slip surface

blocks.label: Variant
items: Elastic resistance band above the knees

title: Hop on / off Box
goal: Control the impact forces with reduced/increased joint load
execution: Take off and land on both legs
Land on the whole sole of the foot
Optimal flexion at the knee and hip joints

blocks.label: Notes
items: Safe, non-slip surface

blocks.label: Variant
items: Single-leg jumps

title: Side Hop
goal: Control the impact forces with high joint load
execution: Take off and land on the same leg
Gradually increase the number of consecutive contacts

blocks.label: Notes
items: Safe, non-slip surface

title: Tuck Jumps
goal: Repeated two-legged jumps with the centre of gravity as high as possible
execution: Take off and land on both feet at the same time
Flight phase: tuck both legs up
Landing phase: slight flexion of the knee and hip joints (rebound)
Keep ground contact as short as possible

blocks.label: Notes
items: Safe, non-slip surface

title: Shuttle Run
execution: Set up 3 markers 5 m from the start line, 1 m apart
Linear sprint between the markers
Run backward to the start marker
Sprint to the next, further marker each time
Load: 5 repetitions

title: Change of Direction
execution: Stand in the middle between two markers placed 10 metres apart
Sideways sprint to the outer markers
Load: 10–15 repetitions to each side

title: T-Run
execution: Set up 4 markers 5 m apart in a T shape
Linear sprint to the middle marker
Sideways sprint to the outer markers
Backward sprint to the start marker
Load: 5 repetitions

blocks.label: Notes
items: Advanced late phase: number the markers and sprint to the called-out marker on the coach's shout

title: Cone Drills
execution: Diagonal sprint between markers placed 5 metres apart
Touch the markers with the hand
Load: 5–10 repetitions

blocks.label: Notes
items: Advanced late phase: number the cones and sprint to the corresponding cone on the coach's shout
